prompt: A Renaissance-inspired portrait of a noblewoman with intricate jewelry, in a velvet gown, gazing thoughtfully.
prompt_refined: A highly detailed Renaissance-style oil painting portrait of an elegant noblewoman, wearing a rich, deep crimson velvet gown and adorned with intricate gold and pearl jewelry. She gazes thoughtfully with a serene, contemplative expression. The portrait is illuminated by soft, diffused light, highlighting her features against a subtly detailed classical interior background.
